title: Mosin PU Crosshair
description: Simple Resource Pack that changes the default crosshair to one inspired by the post style crosshair from a Mosin-Nagant PU Scope - Incompatible with other Packs that change icons.png
body:
Very simple pack that changes the crosshair to resemble the iconic post-style of the PU scope, commonly found on the Mosin-Nagant rifles.

Incompatible with any other resource pack that alters the on screen HUD
